api_key.description: Drip API key. Sent as the HTTP Basic username with a blank password; never logged.

base_url.description: Drip API base URL override for tests or proxies.

account_id.description: Drip account ID; path-scopes the subscribers/campaigns/broadcasts streams (the accounts stream itself is account-agnostic).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
